fields.summary: start-yarn and stop-yarn scripts to support timeline and sharedcachemanager

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
The start-yarn and stop-yarn scripts don't have any (even commented out) support for the  timeline and sharedcachemanager

Proposed:
* bash and cmd start-yarn scripts have commented out start actions
* stop-yarn scripts stop the servers.

comments.body: Adds the extra services, ready to be uncommented by anyone who wants them.
this patch is branch-2; trunk will need the same only reworked for the new bash scripts. Windows will remain the same
